name: Golf Ready Academy
about: Golf Ready Academy is a golf training studio in Westwood, New Jersey, focused on a science-based approach to game improvement. The academy utilizes technology to provide a 1-hour full swing assessment, building a sequential road map to a golfer's goals. They combine swing instruction with physical golf fitness training, offering programs for both competitive players and juniors. Their approach addresses the entire game, with instructors having over 50 years of experience in developing amateur and junior tournament winners.
why_golfers_like_it: Science-based system that combines swing analysis with physical fitness training
1-hour full swing assessment using the latest golf technology to diagnose issues
Custom training programs developed from assessment data to guide golfers to their goals

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service available
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB status unclear

simulator_hardware.notes: Website mentions 'latest golf technology' for swing analysis, but no specific hardware brand is listed

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs for your lesson or practice session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a policy on outside food and drinks. It is best to contact them directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide information on the time it takes to complete 18 holes on their simulators.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Golf Ready Academy offers specific junior programs and clinics, indicating they cater to young golfers.
